mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apt_complex (complex_no, name, road_addr, sido, sigungu, dong, bjdong_code, lat, lng, total_household, build_year) VALUES (#{complexNo}, #{name}, #{roadAddr}, #{sido}, #{sigungu}, #{dong}, #{bjdongCode}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{totalHousehold}, #{buildYear})
mapper.update: UPDATE apt_complex SET lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE apt_complex SET sigungu = #{sigungu}, sido = #{sido} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM apt_complex WHERE (lat IS NULL OR lng IS NULL) AND name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apt_trade (complex_id, deal_year, deal_month, deal_day, area, floor, price) VALUES (#{complexId}, #{dealYear}, #{dealMonth}, #{dealDay}, #{area}, #{floor}, #{price})

INSERT INTO apt_rent (complex_id, rent_type, deal_year, deal_month, area, floor, deposit, monthly_rent) VALUES (#{complexId}, #{rentType}, #{dealYear}, #{dealMonth}, #{area}, #{floor}, #{deposit}, #{monthlyRent})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM apt_official_price WHERE complex_id = #{complexId} AND year = #{year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apt_official_price (complex_id, year, dong, ho, area, official_price) VALUES (#{complexId}, #{year}, #{dong}, #{ho}, #{area}, #{officialPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT dong FROM apt_complex WHERE sigungu = #{sigungu} AND dong IS NOT NULL AND dong != '' ORDER BY dong

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.road_addr, c.sigungu, c.dong, c.lat, c.lng, CAST(AVG(t.price) AS INTEGER) AS avg_trade_price, CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN r.rent_type = '전세' THEN r.deposit END) AS INTEGER) AS avg_deposit_price FROM apt_complex c LEFT JOIN apt_trade t ON c.id = t.complex_id AND t.deal_year >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1 LEFT JOIN apt_rent r ON c.id = r.complex_id AND r.deal_year >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1 WHERE c.sigungu = #{sigungu} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.road_addr, c.sigungu, c.dong, c.lat, c.lng ORDER BY avg_trade_price ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50
